Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and efficiency for developers when using complex shapes in their games.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the Git hash of the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes in the codebase for better version control.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are formatted.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves readability of time-related information for players, making it easier to understand game events.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a specific method to reference code versions.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and fixes quickly.
